_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

_filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: When enabled Act 2 Items, V-Bloods and Spells will be included in the Multiworld.
When enabled Act 3 Items, V-Bloods and Spells will be included in the Multiworld.
When enabled Act 4 Items, V-Bloods and Spells will be included in the Multiworld.
Adds all the Items you receive from a Knowledge Stations into the pool of items and as extra checks.
These Items which are labeled as 'Structures' and 'Consumables' ingame.
Adds multiple items called 'Lost Souls' into the multiworld, you have to gather them all to goal.
An extra location will be added to each V-Blood called their soul slot to accommodate the added items.
